{"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/approve`/plan.md","content":"# Plan: Implement /api/auth/login and /api/auth/register Route Handlers

## Existing Patterns Found

- **`src/app/api/enroll/route.ts`**: POST handler pattern — JSON body parse via `request.json()`, `getPayloadInstance()`, returns `new Response(JSON.stringify(...), { status, headers })`
- **`src/app/api/health/route.ts`**: Minimal public GET pattern — returns `Response` directly
- **`src/api/auth/login.ts`**: Business logic throws `Error & { status: number }`; returns `LoginResult` with `{ accessToken, refreshToken, user }`
- **`src/api/auth/register.ts`**: Business logic throws `Error & { status: number }`; calls `authService.login()` on success
- **`src/auth/auth-service.ts`**: `AuthService.login()` uses PBKDF2, returns `AuthResult`; throws 401 on invalid credentials (no info leakage)
- **`src/utils/schema.ts`**: Custom mini-Zod: `s.string()`, `s.object()`, `s.strin… [+15283 chars]
